name: a2a-test-alone
description: Start demo UI and agents simultaneously

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "backend,frontend,img,med,mm" -c "blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:agent:images" "npm run dev:agent:medical" "npm run dev:agent:multimodal"
scripts.dev:agent:images: cd samples/python/agents/images && uv run python -m app
scripts.dev:agent:medical: cd samples/python/agents/medical_Images && uv run python -m app
scripts.dev:agent:multimodal: cd samples/python/agents/multimodal && uv run python -m app
